'''ngaruyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumocyclicin|pneumocyclicin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-r-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumocyclicin|pneumocyclicin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngaruyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæriyith|ngæriyith]] || [[word:ngæriyij|ngæriyij]] || [[word:ngæriyish|ngæriyish]] || [[word:ngæriyi|ngæriyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngaruruyuth|ngaruruyuth]] || [[word:ngaruruyuj|ngaruruyuj]] || [[word:ngaruruyush|ngaruruyush]] || [[word:ngaruruyu|ngaruruyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngaruyuth|ngaruyuth]] || [[word:ngaruyuj|ngaruyuj]] || [[word:ngaruyush|ngaruyush]] || [[word:ngaruyu|ngaruyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngarufyuth|ngarufyuth]] || [[word:ngarufyuj|ngarufyuj]] || [[word:ngarufyush|ngarufyush]] || [[word:ngarufyuf|ngarufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngaruyuthu|ngaruyuthu]] || [[word:ngaruyuju|ngaruyuju]] || [[word:ngaruyushu|ngaruyushu]] || [[word:ngaruyuku|ngaruyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngaruyuth|ngaruyuth]] || [[word:ngaruyuj|ngaruyuj]] || [[word:ngaruyush|ngaruyush]] || [[word:ngaruyu|ngaruyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngaruyuthul|ngaruyuthul]] || [[word:ngaruyujul|ngaruyujul]] || [[word:ngaruyushul|ngaruyushul]] || [[word:ngaruyukul|ngaruyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngaruyuthuthu|ngaruyuthuthu]] || [[word:ngaruyujuju|ngaruyujuju]] || [[word:ngaruyushushu|ngaruyushushu]] || [[word:ngaruyuku|ngaruyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngaruyuthun|ngaruyuthun]] || [[word:ngaruyujun|ngaruyujun]] || [[word:ngaruyushun|ngaruyushun]] || [[word:ngaruyukun|ngaruyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngaruyuthuoro|ngaruyuthuoro]] || [[word:ngaruyujuoro|ngaruyujuoro]] || [[word:ngaruyushuoro|ngaruyushuoro]] || [[word:ngaruyukuoro|ngaruyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
